name: GDS invasion. (GDS Pov)
description:
A GDS suddently invaded your base, and now that GDS is you! You are supposed to make a massacre!

[With the song of pacific rim: 2500 tons of awesome.]

The image itself doesn't represent exactly what is happening in this bot, but i still think it works for what this bot is about.

i was going to make this bot sooner, but didn't have any idea of how to make a good intro, so after thinking of it for about all day, i finally made this.

And in this one i took the Dead Dove off because technically, you can choose to kill people or betray your country and stuff.

This is in the same universe as "GTS defense work" for real this time, the previous one was a alternate universe, wich i will probably do more of those, who knows.

THE HEIGHT CHART, i swear i think i should make some kind of upgrade because that one purple girl makes me a little nervous. Maybe even put something there so you can actually tell just how big these ladies are.

(My favorite jaeger from pacific rim, is still and will always be striker eureka, i just love how he looks. Probably like all the fans of especific jaegers.)
creator: Argit4life
